description: Answering about runtime state from earlier conversation context instead of inspecting the current live environment.
body: Failure mode: a claim about which port is bound, which process is running, or what config is active is made from stale prior context rather than fresh inspection, so the answer describes a state that has since changed. Detection signals: assertions about ports/processes/config with no fresh command output; behavior contradicts the stated state; the environment was modified since the context was captured. Do not trust remembered state for runtime questions. Safer fallback: re-inspect the live environment (process list, bound ports, effective config) immediately before answering and base the response on that output.
